name: Vegetable Pasta Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 cup zucchini, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
2 lbs tomatoes, red ripe, peeled and cored
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan over medium heat, cook onion, garlic, basil, tarragon, fennel, and oregano in oil, stirring often, until the onion is limp (10-15 minutes).
2. Add zucchini, mushrooms, and green bell pepper. Cook until mushrooms are limp, stirring often, for 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Add wine, tomatoes, tomato paste, and sugar to the pan. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until the sauce is thick, stirring occasionally, about 45 minutes. Use hot or cool; cover and refrigerate.
